name: The Deal of Destiny
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>運</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>命</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>契</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>約</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each time a card(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, place 1 Emperor's Key Counter on this card (max. 1). If your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) from the Extra Deck (except during the Damage Step): You can remove 1 Emperor's Key Counter from this card; send 1 "The Door of Destiny" from your hand, Deck, or face-up field to the GY, Special Summon 1 LIGHT "Utopia" or "Utopic" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck, and if you do, attach this card to it as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon.) You can only use this effect of "The Deal of Destiny" once per turn.
eff: Each time a card(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, place 1 Emperor's Key Counter on this card (max. 1). If your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) from the Extra Deck (except during the Damage Step): You can remove 1 Emperor's Key Counter from this card; send 1 "The Door of Destiny" from your hand, Deck, or face-up field to the GY, Special Summon 1 LIGHT "Utopia" or "Utopic" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck, and if you do, attach this card to it as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon.) You can only use this effect of "The Deal of Destiny" once per turn.

counter: Removes counters from itself for cost
action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
